title: Alchimiae Magicae
body:
![Banner with the Alchimiae Magicae logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eeb8076c882dfb6f7ad934ca0919b28844e60fe_0.webp)
# Alchimiae Magicae
_Mixing up alchemy!_

Alchimiae Magicae is here to mix up alchemy! By making it accessible earlier in the game, adding a ton of new reagents, and allowing you to mix ingredients to create custom Brews, Alchimiae aims to zest up your alchemical adventures.

I made a video on how to get started [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_yUIWb3qlTQ)!

To get started, craft a Mortar and Pestle or a Grinder, find 2 or more Ingredients, and get mixing! After mashing up some ingredients, either combine that mash with a water bottle directly or toss it in a brewing stand to get some *custom* potions.
